highlights.headline: Washington Wizards vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Washington Wizards vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Washington Wizards vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaime Jaquez Jr. scored 32 points before dashing out to fly to the NCAA women's basketball title game, Kel'el Ware finished with 24 points, 19 rebounds and seven blocks, and the Miami Heat rolled past the Washington Wizards 152-136 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaquez scores 32, Ware blocks 7 shots and Heat roll past Wizards 152-136

video.headline: Washington Wizards vs. Miami Heat: Game Highlights

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Denver Nuggets

highlights.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Denver Nuggets - Game Highlights
highlights.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Denver Nuggets - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Denver Nuggets - Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 40 points, 13 assists and eight rebounds, Christian Braun added 21 points and the Denver Nuggets beat San Antonio 136-134 in overtime Saturday to snap the Spurs’ 11-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jokic scores 40, outduels Wembanyama and Nuggets top Spurs 136-134 in OT

video.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Denver Nuggets - Game Highlights

highlights.headline: Detroit Pistons vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Detroit Pistons vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Detroit Pistons vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tobias Harris scored 19 points, and Daniss Jenkins added 16 points and 14 assists as the Detroit Pistons beat the Philadelphia 76ers 116-93 Saturday night to clinch the top seed in the Eastern Conference playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pistons beat 76ers 116-93 and clinch the top seed in the Eastern Conference
